title: Governance Event
description: Standardized event representing a proposal, vote, or administrative governance action.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this governance event.

proposerId.description: Identifier for the user or agent that initiated the event.

sessionId.description: Optional session identifier if the governance action is tied to a specific authoring or runtime session.

descriptorId.description: Generic descriptor join key linking this event to a higher-level descriptor or bundle.

targetDescriptorId.description: Join key linking this event to the descriptor, template, or pattern it concerns.

targetRulesetId.description: Join key linking this event to a specific ruleset or policy being modified.

proposalDetails.description: Details specific to proposal events, such as rationale or proposed policy text.

voteResults.description: Structured results of a vote, including individual choices.

votes.description: Per-voter choices as recorded by the governance system.

voterId.description: Identifier for the voter, which may map to an agent or human profile.

timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when this event occurred.
